comments: Many more calling in trees around pond.
6 males and 2 females in westernmost paddock. Photographed
Preening and resting on rocks at water's edge.
Either Purple Sandpiper or Dunlin. Small, plain greyish brown birds foraging by Oystercatchers. Short, dark bills, legs appear to be pinkish, orange. Dark underbelly more like PUSA than Dunlin.
Walking in local park when Merlin starts picking up lots of unusual calls, buzzard, curlew, oystercatcher. Look up and realize it's a bunch of starlings mimicking these calls! Haha
